mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month as liquidity conditions improve.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0%, equity markets price in severe earnings deterioration, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in over 60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts signals robust consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative forward returns in more than 50% of cases or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a monetary easing cycle indicates improving corporate output capacity without inflationary pressure, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during easing periods or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation measured by CPIAUCSL accelerates above 2.5% year-over-year, markets anticipate aggressive central bank tightening, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in over 55% of triggered instances or the threshold fails to separate return distributions significantly.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rate indicates labor market tightening that boosts corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over three months.
failure_condition: Combined signal yields negative returns in more than 50% of observations or interaction effect vanishes in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly correlates with aggregate corporate earnings growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month as macro fundamentals improve.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a liquidity crunch regime signals severe supply-side contraction, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following week as earnings forecasts are downgraded.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns in over 60% of triggered instances or loses predictive power during credit stress periods.
